title: Performance Guarantee
description: A guaranteed minimum rate for a performance metric, measured by a specified vendor. Used in measurement_terms to declare, propose, or agree on performance thresholds.

min_rate.description: Minimum acceptable rate as a decimal (e.g., 0.70 means at least 70%). The denominator depends on the metric: viewability uses measurable_impressions, completion_rate uses total impressions.

standard.description: Measurement standard applied. Required when metric is 'viewability' (MRC and GroupM define materially different thresholds). Omit for metrics without competing standards.

vendor.description: Vendor measuring this metric (e.g., { domain: 'doubleverify.com' }). When specified on a confirmed package, creatives MUST include tracker_script or tracker_pixel assets from this vendor.
